title: Fix missing Add Team Member option in UI

requirements.text: Ensure the 'Add Team Member' button is visible and functional on the Team Members page (frontend/src/pages/TeamMembers.tsx). The button should open the AddUserModal (frontend/src/components/AddUserModal.tsx) when clicked. Verify the button is rendered in the page header or toolbar area and is not hidden due to a missing condition, incorrect auth guard, or rendering bug.

quotes: Add Team Member option is not showing

acceptanceCriteria: An 'Add Team Member' button is visible on the Team Members page when logged in as an admin
Clicking the button opens the AddUserModal dialog
The modal allows submitting a new user and the new member appears in the list after creation
The button does not appear for non-admin users if role-based visibility is intended

requirements.text: Audit the AdminDashboard page (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx) team members tab to ensure the 'Add Team Member' action is also accessible from there if it was previously present. Fix any missing button, broken import, or incorrect conditional rendering that prevents it from showing.

quotes: Add Team Member option is not showing

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Team Member' option is visible in the team members tab of the Admin Dashboard
The option correctly invokes the AddUserModal

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change the backend schema or actor interface
nonGoals: Adding new backend endpoints or changing existing ones
Redesigning the Team Members page layout
Changing user role or permission logic
